title: Deprecated Read Binary File node not working
symptom: The deprecated Read Binary File node does not output data, while the new node functions correctly.
applies_when: Using the Read Binary File node
not_this_if: Using the new Read/Write Files from Disk node
root_cause: The Read Binary File node has been deprecated and is likely broken in recent versions of n8n. It includes a setting that prevents it from outputting data, making it incompatible with current workflows.
fix_steps: Create a new Read/Write Files from Disk node
Transfer the parameters from the old Read Binary File node to the new one
Delete the old Read Binary File node
agent_instruction: Replace the deprecated Read Binary File node with a new Read/Write Files from Disk node.
